title: Legacy Glass
description: A texture pack that restores Minecraft’s classic glass textures, bringing back the nostalgic framed and streaked look in place of the modern clean glass.
body:
A texture pack that reintroduces Minecraft’s classic glass textures, bringing back the nostalgic framed edges and subtle streaks. It replaces the modern clean glass with the older, more iconic look to give builds a retro, familiar feel.

**Join our Discord below to get notified for updates or releases.**

[Discord link](https://discord.gg/hU2Z62Ng7t)
